uplink.description: full 5-in-1 frame: battery, temperature, humidity, CO2, TVOC, HCHO
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. Channel ids/types/byte-widths per upstream Decoder(); expected raw values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (battery 75%, temp 0x0110 LE /10 = 27.2 °C, humidity 90/2 = 45%, CO2 0x02d0 = 720 ppm, TVOC 44, HCHO 20), then normalized: battery%-> batteryPercent extra, temp/humidity/co2 -> air.*, tvoc/hcho -> air.* extras.

uplink.description: negative temperature with battery and humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the two's-complement signed temperature path. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: temp 0xfff6 LE = -10 /10 = -1.0 °C, humidity 70/2 = 35%, battery 100%.

uplink.description: CO2-only frame (air-quality core measurement in isolation)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: CO2 0x0190 LE = 400 ppm. Normalized to air.co2.

uplink.description: unrecognized channel -> error (upstream silently returns empty object)
uplink._note: Synthetic error frame. Upstream Decoder() breaks on the unknown channel and returns a bare {data:{}}, which the output contract forbids; our codec reports an error instead.
